heading: Special provisions relating to surviving spouses
label: 1102 Special provisions relating to surviving spouses
notes: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 302 of this titleSubsec. (b). , substituted “administered by the Secretary” for “administered by the Veterans’ Administration”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 4(a)(1)1976—, substituted “surviving spouses” for “widows” in section catchline.Pub. L. 94–433, § 404(4)Subsec. (a). , substituted “surviving spouse of a veteran under this chapter unless such surviving spouse was married to such veteran” for “widow of a veteran under this chapter unless she was married to him”.Pub. L. 94–433, § 404(2)Subsec. (b). , substituted “surviving spouse” for “widow” in two places.Pub. L. 94–433, § 404(3)1967—Subsec. (a)(2), (3). qualified widow of a veteran for receipt of compensation by reducing in par. (2) the requisite marriage period from five years to one year and by making her eligible for benefits in par. (3) in event of antenuptial birth.Pub. L. 90–771960—Subsec. (a)(1). substituted “fifteen years” for “ten years”.Pub. L. 86–491
Effective Date of 1976 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 94–433section 406 of Pub. L. 94–433section 1101 of this titleOct. 1, 1976

Effective Date of 1967 AmendmentAmendment by effective first day of first calendar month which begins more than ten days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 90–77section 405 of Pub. L. 90–77section 101 of this titleAug. 31, 1967

children.text: before the expiration of fifteen years after the termination of the period of service in which the injury or disease causing the death of the veteran was incurred or aggravated; or
for one year or more; or
for any period of time if a child was born of the marriage, or was born to them before the marriage.

children.label: b
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not be applicable to any surviving spouse who, with respect to date of marriage, could have qualified as a surviving spouse for death compensation under any law administered by the Secretary in effect on .December 31, 1957
